word: G232 - ἁλιεύω - halieúō - hal-ee-yoo'-o - Go a-fishing

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἁλιεύω

- Transliteration: Halieuo

- Phonetic: hal-ee-yoo'-o

- Definition:

1. to fish

- Origin: from G231

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G231; to be a fisher that is (by implication) to fish: - go a-fishing.
